_meta.note: Top 4 of 8+ genome-wide significant loci (p<5×10⁻⁸) from published paper. Statistics are approximate from published figures; download full summary statistics via Edinburgh data access for exact values and all loci. Gene names confirmed in CLAUDE.md from paper reading.

loci.locus_notes: Butyrophilin family — immune checkpoint on T cells; BTN3A1 activates Vγ9Vδ2 T cells and is an active drug target in oncology (anti-BTN3A antibodies in trials)
Olfactomedin-4 — innate immune regulation; expressed in neutrophils and gut epithelium; links to microbiome-immune axis
RAB GTPase-activating protein — vesicle trafficking; PTPRD is a neural/immune phosphatase with links to chronic pain and synaptic regulation
ABC transporter — overlaps a chronic pain GWAS locus; lipid/cholesterol transport in immune cells; shared genetic architecture with chronic pain conditions
